name: Accent Group Limited
analysis: AX1 just fired a speculative volume-spike breakout — volume hit 3.0× its 20-day average as price broke out of its base. It's coming off a base 53% below the 1-year high, so there's room to run. The 9-SMA has reclaimed the 26 — short-term momentum is up. RSI has turned up through its signal line. These are high-risk speculative names — they move fast both ways, so size small and respect the stop. Trade idea: entry A$0.7550, stop A$0.5346, target A$0.8834 (0.58:1) — then trail it.
